message: Node started: For each of the following PDEs, identify the dimension n and the diffusion order 2s, then calculate the specific De Giorgi exponent using the general formula derived by the first helper: 1. 3D Navier-Stokes, 2. 2D Navier-Stokes, 3. 1D Burgers, 4. Surface Quasi-Geostrophic (SQG) equation, 5. Magnetohydrodynamics (MHD), 6. Fractional Navier-Stokes. List the (n, s) pair and the resulting exponent for each.
